offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We streamline manual invoice tracking instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Managing multiple invoices and payments efficiently.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM 20-50 Etsy sellers with demo video
Participate in Etsy seller forums and groups
try_it: Let users try invoice processing on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
